observations.title: regression-gate プロンプト Contract 欄が spec-fixer 分を含む ledger と乖離する
observations.rationale: Req 4 の実装で collectFindingsLedger の走査対象に spec-review を追加すると、regression-gate-system.ts line 25 の Contract 欄「code-fixer が修正した fixable findings の完全リスト」が事実と乖離する（spec-fixer が修正した findings も含まれるため）。Method の読み取りロジックは file-agnostic なので動作上の問題はないが、プロンプトテキストの更新を implementation-notes に列挙しておくと実装漏れを防げる。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/spec-observation-autofix/ on branch change/spec-observation-autofix-42be65c4.

Design summary — port impl-side observation auto-fix into the spec phase:
- D1: `deriveSpecReviewVerdict` 4b restricted to routable critical/high → needs-fix; routable low/medium-only falls through to approved (findings still recorded). 4a/decision-needed/ok=false/vacuous escalation unchanged.
- D2: add `buildCanonWriteScopeFromState(state)` (slug via getJobSlug) so transition `when` predicates (state-only) can compute routable canon findings; existing buildCanonWriteScope(state,deps) unchanged, both delegate to a shared private helper.
- D3/D4: new pure module `src/core/pipeline/spec-observation.ts` with `specReviewHasRoutableFixables` + `specFixerForwardsToTestGen`; two guarded STANDARD_TRANSITIONS rows (SPEC_REVIEW approved→SPEC_FIXER when routable fixable≥1; SPEC_FIXER approved→TEST_CASE_GEN when observation pass), placed before the existing unconditional rows. Conformance/needs-fix spec-fixer still return to spec-review (gated by getConformanceFixContext + latest spec-review verdict).
- D5: budget non-consumption is structural — the direct spec-fixer→test-case-gen edge never re-enters spec-review; T-03 budget-skip reroute already handles fixer-budget exhaustion.
- D6: add `collectSpecReviewLedger` (spec-fixer resolver so spec/design/tasks findings are retained, request.md/test-cases.md excluded) and merge it into regression-gate buildMessage/skipWhen ledger. regression-gate exists only with custom reviewers — symmetric with impl side.

Verified (outside attestation list): getJobSlug helper, Transition.when signature, regression-gate injection only via compose-reviewers, getConformanceFixContext recency, spec-fixer normal-entry reads, STANDARD_TRANSITIONS.length==44 test.

Existing tests to update (enumerated in tasks T-07 for implementation-notes): spec-review-fixer-routing.test.ts TC-001/002/005/013/015 (needs-fix→approved), spec-fixer-tasks-md-writable.test.ts TC-003 (needs-fix→approved), pipeline.transitions.test.ts TC-030 (length 44→46).
